definition_of_done: Multiple companies, multiple users, role paths, tenant isolation, mail/onboarding, billing, and live Railway/Vercel proof must pass together.

gates.detail: Live production invite acceptance returned 500 on 2026-06-26; fix requires deploy plus production accept proof.
Invite mail delivery must be tracked as sent/failed and cannot be claimed sent until the provider accepts the message.
Platform admin tenant-scoped polling produced 400 before agency selection; regression tests and production UI proof are required.
Tenant isolation matrix must pass for leads, users, notifications, analytics, conversations, visits, and billing after this reset.
super_admin, company_admin, sales_agent, operations, and viewer path coverage must pass together.
SSO/MFA/SCIM status is not complete enough to call the platform enterprise-ready.
Railway health, production smoke, Vercel UI flows, invite email, forgot-password email, and cross-company access proof are still required.

notes: This report intentionally supersedes the previous ready=true artifact.
Do not set ready=true from documentation alone; regenerate from live automated and production evidence.
